title: ABOUT | Advize Wealth

meta.description: HI, I'M COLIN. My passion is to help people live their greatest life by crafting and executing goal-driven financial strategies.
meta.og_description: HI, I'M COLIN. My passion is to help people live their greatest life by crafting and executing goal-driven financial strategies.

headings.text: Advize Wealth Management is a comprehensive financial planning
firm specialized in helping busy professionals achieve financial freedom.

Financial planning is more than just growing large portfolios; it's about providing the means to live a purposeful life. We believe that developing deep and meaningful relationships with our clients is the key to giving valuable and personable advice.
No products, just advice!

COLIN OVERWEG, CFP®
Founder, Financial Advisor

Professional:
I was sick of commissions, proprietary products, sales quotes, clucky technology and being told how to help my clients so left the broker dealer world forever and launched Advize Wealth!
Since then I've been named an Investopedia Top 100 Advisor in the Country, serve on the Board for the Financial Planning Association, frequently guest lecture at Universities have been feature in multiple publications.
My passion is to power yours!

Personal:
I live in Michigan with my amazing wife and daughter!
When I'm not working, you can find me at the beach attempting to surf, long boarding, mountain biking, making financial videos, golfing and traveling!
© 2026 Advize Wealth Management PLLC. All Rights Reserved.

Advize Wealth Management is a comprehensive financial planning
firm specialized in helping busy professionals achieve financial freedom.
Financial planning is more than just growing large portfolios; it's about providing the means to live a purposeful life. We believe that developing deep and meaningful relationships with our clients is the key to giving valuable and personable advice.
No products, just advice!
​
COLIN OVERWEG, CFP®
Founder, Financial Advisor
Professional:
I was sick of commissions, proprietary products, sales quotes, clucky technology and being told how to help my clients so left the broker dealer world forever and launched Advize Wealth!
Since then I've been named an Investopedia Top 100 Advisor in the Country, serve on the Board for the Financial Planning Association, frequently guest lecture at Universities have been feature in multiple publications.
My passion is to power yours!
Personal:
I live in Michigan with my amazing wife and daughter!
When I'm not working, you can find me at the beach attempting to surf, long boarding, mountain biking, making financial videos, golfing and traveling!
